case_title: ABDALLA MEGAHED VS. TROUDI MONGI et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEGAHED, ABDALLA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED APR-17-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BENCHEKOR, AMIN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEGAHED, ABDALLA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MONGI, TROUDI BENCHEKOR, AMIN ASAAD, ASAAD STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MEGAHED, ABDALLA AS TO DEFENDANT MONGI, TROUDI BENCHEKOR, AMIN ASAAD, ASAAD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-19-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEGAHED, ABDALLA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-19-2008 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUL-14-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANTS AMIN BENCHEKOR AND ASAAD ASAAD PRESENT. DEFENDANT TROUDI MONGI NOT PRESENT. PER DEFENDANT AMIN BENCHEKOR DEFENDANT TROUDI MONGI IS OUT OF THE COUNTRY. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
